war_leader_profession_skills.source: Last War: Survival community guide - Season 2

tier_legend.A: Useful but upgrade towards end of season
tier_legend.B: Not required, based on personal preference

skills.name: Unit Mobilization
skills.notes: Max units are 250. Not too impressive but good.

skills.name: Hospital Prep
skills.notes: Level 5 is 10%.

skills.name: Craze
skills.notes: Must have Craze maxed for Hyper War Fever at level 55.

skills.name: Building Inspiration 1
skills.notes: Top priority of the 3 since building those titanium alloy factories.

skills.name: Winning Pursuit
skills.notes: Barely noticeable.

skills.name: Intensive Training
skills.notes: Level 5 is 25%.

skills.name: Winter Wonderland
skills.notes: Required as a prerequisite.

skills.name: Warefare Supplies
skills.notes: Good for farming. Increases limit up to 50%.

skills.name: Double Exchange
skills.notes: Good initially but useless later on.

skills.name: Firebomb
skills.notes: Start with 1 or 2. Very helpful for alliance and members.

skills.name: Tactical Reinforce
skills.notes: 5% barely noticeable - only good for buster event.

skills.name: Reinforce Strengthen
skills.notes: Only if you reinforce already.

skills.name: Decay Ray
skills.notes: Mainly used for grudges as it puts back their progress.

skills.name: Charge Banner
skills.notes: Useful in soil war and capturing cities.

skills.name: Hold the Base
skills.notes: Only if you don't mind putting troops on your wall.

skills.name: Rally Guard
skills.notes: Barely noticeable.

skills.name: Gather for Warmth
skills.notes: Can use recon planes and save the point.

skills.name: Base Strike
skills.notes: Up to 5%.

skills.name: Destruction Mine
skills.notes: Only works on other servers + long cooldown.

skills.name: Hyper War Fever
skills.notes: Must have Craze maxed out first. Must have.

skills.name: Rally Vanguard
skills.notes: Only good if you're the rally initiator.

skills.name: Frostbomb
skills.notes: Can just turn off furnace to lower temperature.

skills.name: Efficient Training
skills.notes: Valuable because of the cost of T10s.

skills.name: Front Mine
skills.notes: Can freeze enemy in soil war, but not essential.

skills.name: Combat Raider
skills.notes: Not needed as much due to other War Leader skills, nice to have.

skills.name: Banner Upgrade
skills.notes: If you like Charge Banner, this may be good to have as well.

skills.name: Assault Squad
skills.notes: Other more valuable skills on the list.

must_upgrade_first: Craze (lv10) - S+, max 5/5 — required before Hyper War Fever
Hyper War Fever (lv55) - S+, max 5/5 — requires Craze maxed
skip_or_minimal: Reinforce Strengthen (lv35) - B, skip unless you reinforce often
